description: Telegram channel analytics and statistics for AI agents, pay-per-call in USDC via x402.
name: io.telemost/telemost-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Base (EVM) wallet private key (0x...) that funds x402 payments. One of EVM/SVM required for paid tools.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Solana wallet secret key (base58) that funds x402 payments. One of EVM/SVM required for paid tools.
environmentVariables.name: SVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.telemost.io.
environmentVariables.name: TELEMOST_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Per-call price ceiling in USD (default 1). Calls above this are refused before signing.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_PAYMENT_USDC

environmentVariables.description: Cumulative spend ceiling per process lifetime in USD (default 10).
environmentVariables.name: SESSION_MAX_USDC
